Subject: 📅 Itinerary: Paris to Delhi (2025–2026) ✈️
Chère Renée-Louise, 🌸
I hope you are having a wonderful day! I have finalized the travel dates for our upcoming research trip—the one we discussed last October—and the timeline is now set for December 15–January 10. 🗓️
During our stay in Paris, we must visit the Musée d’Orsay—not just for the Impressionists, but for the architecture itself! 🏛️ Afterward, when we arrive in India, my friend Aditi has promised to show us the best local spots. She told me, "आपको यहाँ का खाना बहुत पसंद आएगा" (You will love the food here) and I honestly can’t wait! 🥘✨
Quick Reminders:
Flight duration: ~9–10 hours ✈️
Temperature range: 15°C–28°C ☀️
Essential phrase: नमस्ते (Namaste) — used for both hello and goodbye. 🙏
Don't forget your visa-on-arrival documents—it’s a long process! 📄✍️
Life is a beautiful journey—sometimes messy, sometimes clear—and I am so glad we are doing this together. See you soon! 🥂👯‍♀️
Amicalement,
Jean-Luc 🇫🇷
